dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires regime detection (momentum vs mean-reversion). Used ADX_14 as primary trend/momentum identifier: ADX > 25 indicates strong trend (momentum regime, apply tight stops); ADX < 20 indicates weak trend/ranging (mean-reversion regime, relax stops). Fundamental deterioration detection not directly available; use price behavior relative to moving averages as proxy. Entry conditions detect trend direction; exit conditions detect regime shift to mean-reversion.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires regime detection (momentum vs mean-reversion). Used ADX_14 as primary trend/momentum identifier: ADX > 25 indicates strong trend (momentum regime, apply tight stops); ADX < 20 indicates weak trend/ranging (mean-reversion regime, relax stops). Fundamental deterioration detection not directly available; use price behavior relative to moving averages as proxy. Entry conditions detect trend direction; exit conditions detect regime shift to mean-reversion.

source_rule_text: Use stop losses when in a momentum/trending regime (driven by news or fundamental deterioration), but avoid them in mean-reverting regimes where prices recover naturally.
